title: A 4-Meter “Living Fossil” Is Swimming Again in a Swedish River Where It Hadn’t Lived for a Century
description: Scientists have quietly released a massive “living fossil” into Sweden’s Göta River, where it had been missing for over a century.

title: Rare Glass Blobs in Brazil Reveal an Ancient Impact, But Something Is Missing - ScienceAlert
description: Rare Glass Blobs in Brazil Reveal an Ancient Impact, But Something Is Missing ScienceAlertRare glass from 6-million-year-old meteorite strike found in Brazil — but the crater is still missing Space6 Million Years Ago Something Slammed Into Modern-Day Brazil Universe TodayAncient Meteorite Blast Discovered In Brazil After Scientists Find Hundreds Of Glass Fragments Orbital TodayMassive asteroid impact 6.3 million years ago left giant glass field in Brazil ScienceDaily

title: Rare Glass Blobs in Brazil Reveal an Ancient Impact, But Something Is Missing
The travertine quarries that built ancient Rome are carving rock for a new generation of temples
description: TIVOLI, Italy – Long ago, when Romans wanted to build a new temple, they would head to the nearby quarries of Tivoli, chisel out blocks of porous rock called lapis tiburtinus – now known as travertine...

title: Rahul Gandhi attempts ancient Kerala martial art Kalari during college visit | WATCH
description: Rahul Gandhi tries the ancient Kerala martial art Kalaripayattu during an interaction with students at Marian College in Idukki. The viral video shows the Congress leader performing Kalari moves.
